chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 1548 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 2. For hearing of main case 15.05.2024 Mr. Hafeez Bandhani, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Muhammad Zohaib Azam Rajput, Advocate for respondent No.7. Mr. Khuda Bux Chohan, Advocate for respondent No.8. Mr. Zeeshan Haider Qureshi, Assistant Director (Law), ECP. Mr. Ahmed Ali Shahani, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Assistant Director (Law), ECP has filed, through a statement, para wise comments on behalf of respondents No.2 to 4. On the last date of hearing, petitioner’s counsel was put on notice to satisfy the Court about maintainability of the petition, today Mr. Bandhani, in absence of leading counsel, has refused to argue the matter. Accordingly, the petition is dismissed in non-prosecution. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
